small.name: Typical Residence Hall
small.notes: 100 beds; traditional double rooms; shared bathrooms; common lounge; laundry

medium.name: MIT Simmons Hall
medium.notes: Steven Holl; 350 beds; 10 stories; dining hall; theater; study rooms; perforated aluminum facade

large.name: Arizona State University Tooker House
large.notes: 1,700 beds; suite-style; dining; academic support; recreation; convenience retail

space_library.name: Main Entry / Lobby
notes: Card access; mailboxes; package lockers; RA desk; sightlines to elevators

space_library.name: Double Room (Traditional)
notes: Two beds; two desks; two wardrobes; 90-120 SF/bed; lofted beds common; data outlets per bed

space_library.name: Single Room
notes: One bed, desk, wardrobe; 100-160 SF; premium assignment

space_library.name: Suite (4-person typical)
notes: 2 double bedrooms sharing bathroom; common area 80-100 SF; kitchenette optional

space_library.name: Student Apartment (2-4 bedroom)
notes: Full kitchen; living/dining; private or shared bath; laundry hookups optional

space_library.name: Shared Bathroom (Gang/Community)
notes: 1 toilet per 8-10 residents; 1 shower per 8-12; gender-inclusive options; ADA stall

space_library.name: Primary Corridor
notes: Double-loaded typical; 6 ft min width; ADA clearances; fire-rated corridor walls

space_library.name: Floor Lounge / Common Room
notes: TV; soft seating; kitchenette; vending; one per floor or wing; 15-20 SF/resident served

space_library.name: Study Room / Quiet Space
notes: Individual carrels; group study rooms 4-8 person; whiteboard; power outlets; distributed per floor

space_library.name: Laundry Room
notes: 1 washer/dryer pair per 15-25 residents; card-operated; folding table; 1 per floor or centralized

space_library.name: Community Kitchen
notes: Full-size appliances; multiple cooking stations; exhaust hood; traditional halls only

space_library.name: Mailroom / Package Center
notes: Package lockers; Amazon lockers; staffed window for large campus; near lobby

space_library.name: RA Office / Staff Suite
notes: RA apartment or on-call room; desk; program supplies; one per floor/wing

space_library.name: Multipurpose / Programming Room
notes: Floor programs; meetings; game room; flexible furniture; projector

space_library.name: Fitness Room (if included)
notes: Cardio; free weights; rubber floor; optional for larger halls

space_library.name: Bike Storage
notes: 6 SF per bike; secure; ground level; one per 4-5 residents typical

space_library.name: Mechanical Room
notes: HVAC equipment; boilers; water heaters; fire pump

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Main switchgear; panels; transformer; emergency power transfer

plan_archetypes.notes: Double-loaded for residential floors; podium for urban sites
